scripts.dev: concurrently -n account,opportunity,contact,activity,user,mcp,frontend -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,red,white,cyan "npm run dev --prefix services/account" "npm run dev --prefix services/opportunity" "npm run dev --prefix services/contact" "npm run dev --prefix services/activity" "npm run dev --prefix services/user" "npm run dev --prefix services/mcp" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
